about.title: About OneX SpaceTechnologies
about.description: We are a multi-disciplinary technology, research, education, infrastructure, media, and space research community that operates across numerous digital and scientific fields. Our mission is to provide services, research opportunities, learning programs, technical infrastructure, and collaborative projects for individuals, organizations, startups, creators, and researchers worldwide.
about.mission: To build a global ecosystem where technology, science, innovation, education, infrastructure, creativity, business, and space exploration work together to create opportunities, solve problems, and advance knowledge for people around the world.
about.vision: To stand as the world's most comprehensive private community — a unified force spanning software, AI, security, design, media, infrastructure, research, and aerospace. A place where every discipline converges and every member contributes to something greater.

projectInfo.title: Project Ecosystem Value
projectInfo.description: The aggregate value of all active projects, investments, and digital assets within our community ecosystem. This figure represents the community wealth we are building together — every deployment, every tournament, every line of code, every design. It grows as we grow.
